mapper.select: SELECT tool_code, tool_name, description, created_at FROM tool ORDER BY tool_code

SELECT t.tool_code, t.tool_name, t.description, t.created_at FROM group_tool_config gtc JOIN tool t ON t.tool_code = gtc.tool_code WHERE gtc.group_id = #{groupId} AND gtc.status IN ('ENABLE', 'FORCE') ORDER BY t.tool_code

SELECT tool_code FROM tool WHERE tool_code IN
#{toolCode}
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO tool (tool_code, tool_name, description, tool_default_type) VALUES (#{tool.toolCode}, #{tool.toolName}, #{tool.description}, #{tool.toolType})
mapper.update: UPDATE group_tool_config SET status = 'DISABLE' WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND status != 'FORCE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_tool_config (group_id, tool_code, status) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{toolCode}, #{status}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE status = IF(status = 'FORCE', status, VALUES(status)), updated_at = IF(status = 'FORCE', updated_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT IGNORE INTO group_tool_config (group_id, tool_code, status) SELECT #{groupId}, tool_code, tool_default_type FROM tool
mapper.select: SELECT g.group_id, g.tool_code, g.status, g.created_at, g.updated_at, t.tool_name, t.description FROM group_tool_config g LEFT JOIN tool t ON g.tool_code = t.tool_code WHERE g.group_id = #{groupId} ORDER BY g.tool_code;
